devicePolicy: Company PC implements and handles commit/push/PR creation; Home PC updates with git pull after merge; iPad reviews through GitHub app or browser.
updatePolicy: manual git pull from private repository
nextRecommendedStep: Company PC: git switch main, git pull origin main, git status before work. Home PC: after merge, git switch main, git pull origin main, git status, then manually open private-local.html. iPad: browse the private repository.
